reviews.review_description: Can you try to fix the bug because I played this game alot before ik your trying to do a new game but just try to fix pls I love this game so just pls try to fix it😕
Im stuck at spawn but i can move, this game looks fun but i cant play please fix it.

developer_response.body: Sorry but the game like broke like 4 months ago but im making a new game called Galactic Apes its gonna be really fun and it has a horror with backrooms levels really like my old game liminalscape

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun the levels look pretty realistic and it’s so fun it has good cosmetics and it has fan art and I got my fan art in the game and you can if you make some and send it in the discord of the game and the game gets updates pretty often u should download this game.
This is one of the best games I have ever played it is really fun!
